toolSpec.name: calculate_financial_ratio
toolSpec.description: Calculate a financial ratio from numerator and denominator, then compare with the reported value in the source document. Use for current_ratio, roe, or debt_to_equity.

ratioType.description: Type of financial ratio to calculate

numerator.description: Numerator value (e.g., Current Assets for current_ratio)

denominator.description: Denominator value (e.g., Current Liabilities for current_ratio)

reportedValue.description: Value reported in the source financial document for comparison

toolSpec.name: reconcile_line_items
toolSpec.description: Verify that child line items sum equals the parent line item total. Use to detect internal inconsistencies in financial statements.

parentId.description: ID of the parent line item

parentValue.description: Reported value of the parent line item

childIds.description: IDs of child line items to sum

toolSpec.name: cross_validate_periods
toolSpec.description: Compare a metric value between current and prior period to detect anomalous changes.

currentPeriodValue.description: Value in the current reporting period

priorPeriodValue.description: Value in the prior reporting period

metric.description: Name of the metric being compared (e.g., Total Revenue)

tolerancePercent.description: Maximum acceptable change percentage before flagging anomaly (default 50)

toolSpec.name: generate_audit_finding
toolSpec.description: Create a structured audit finding when a discrepancy, missing data, or anomaly is detected.

evidence.description: Supporting data (calculated vs reported values, etc.)
